content: When do the docs at https://rust-for-linux.github.io/docs/kernel/ get updated? It seems like they are at least a release or two out of date
I think that reflects the rust branch which isn't being updated anymore. @Miguel Ojeda should we take a snapshot of that and switch it to use rust-next (or rust-dev) instead?
Note that we also have this on the website: https://rust-for-linux.github.io/docs/v6.6-rc2/kernel/
My plan was to archive and then remove that repository entirely as soon as we get the docs in kernel.org -- which we should have before LPC.
I guess we could overwrite the "root" docs with the v6.6-rc2 ones and put the rust ones into a subfolder instead, and hope people have not bookmarked too many particular items from there.
